citation_and_locator: Lee, Tsoi Lam Sharon. 2019. Focus prosody in Cantonese: the case of verb-copying constructions. University of Hong Kong MA thesis. Handle 10722/279874; official abstract and full-text discussion pp.11-13 plus production-study results
what_it_supports: Direct `V1-dou1-mei6-V2` research target; bare V1 versus aspect-bearing V2; non-stative restriction; negation/other licensor requirement; distinction from verb topicalization; production experiment with 10 young adult native Hong Kong speakers and F0/duration results.
